members.name: Courtney Lee
members.shortBio: Courtney leads Space Heard Us with a heart shaped by the special needs community. She brings the vision of inclusion and music to life.
members.extendedStory: Courtney's life has been deeply shaped by the special needs community through her own family. She founded Space Heard Us to serve the community and to shine a light on the unique gifts and talents of children with disabilities.

members.name: Kaden Joo
members.shortBio: Kaden brings joy and dedication to every performance and rehearsal, sharing his gift of music with the group and the community.

members.name: Eric Kim
members.shortBio: Eric shares his voice and rhythm with Space Heard Us, connecting with audiences through song and percussion.
